lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਨਮੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: guramukh marai na janamai guramukh guramukh sabad samaahaa he |10|
lines.english: The Gurmukh does not die, the Gurmukh is not reborn; the Gurmukh is immersed in the Shabad. ||10||
Throughout the four ages, he recognizes the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
The Gurmukh praises the Naam, and the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰਿ ਉਧਾਰੇ ਸਬਦੇ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਸਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: ek naam jug chaar udhaare sabade naam visaahaa he |11|
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the One Lord, saves and redeems throughout the four ages. Through the Shabad, one trades in the Naam. ||11||
God is inaccessible, unfathomable and self-sufficient.
The Gurmukh obtains eternal peace and tranqulity.
The Gurmukh enshrines the Naam within his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਬੂਝੈ ਕਾਟੇ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਫਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai so naam boojhai kaatte duramat faahaa he |12|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh recognizes the Naam, and the noose of evil-mindedness is snapped. ||12||
The Gurmukh wells up from, and then merges back into Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਨ ਜੂਨੀ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naa mar jamai na joonee paavai |
lines.english: He does not die and take birth, and is not consigned to reincarnation.
The Gurmukhs, the devotees, are exalted and beautified in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਰਹਹਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਲੈਦੇ ਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh sadaa raheh rang raate anadin laide laahaa he |13|
lines.english: The Gurmukh remains forever imbued with the color of the Lord's Love. Night and day, he earns a profit. ||13||
They are embellished with the True Word of His Bani, and the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਹਜ ਸੇਤੀ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: anadin gun gaavai din raatee sehaj setee ghar jaahaa he |14|
lines.english: Night and day, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, day and night, and they intuitively go to their own home. ||14||
night and day, remain lovingly attuned to devotional worship.
The Perfect True Guru proclaims the Shabad;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਗੁਣ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: har gun gaaveh sad hee niramal niramal gun paatisaahaa he |15|
lines.english: One who sings forever the Glorious Praises of the Lord, becomes immaculate; Immaculate are the Glorious Praises of the Sovereign Lord . ||15||
The True Lord is the Giver of virtue.
How rare are those who, as Gurmukh, understand this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹੇ ਬਿਗਸੈ ਸੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਬੇਪਰਵਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੨॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jan naam salaahe bigasai so naam beparavaahaa he |16|2|11|
lines.english: Servant Nanak praises the Naam; he blossoms forth in the ecstasy of the Name of the self-sufficient Lord. ||16||2||11||
Serve the Dear Lord, the inaccessible and infinite.
Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis daa ant na paaeeai paaraavaaraa |
lines.english: He has no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤਿਤੁ ਘਟਿ ਮਤਿ ਅਗਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad raviaa ghatt antar tith ghatt mat agaahaa he |1|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one who dwells upon the Lord deep within his heart - his heart is filled with infinite wisdom. ||1||
By Guru's Grace, He is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲ ਕਰੇ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦੇਦਾ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸੰਬਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa pratipaal kare jagajeevan dedaa rijak sanbaahaa he |2|
lines.english: The Life of the world nurtures and cherishes all, giving sustenance to all. ||2||
The One Lord is pervading and permeating amidst all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮੰਨੇ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਾਹਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: hukam mane soee sukh paae hukam sir saahaa paatisaahaa he |3|
lines.english: Whoever submits to His Command, finds peace; His Command is above the heads of kings and emperors. ||3||
The Perfect True Guru has imparted this understanding.
By the Hukam of His Command, He created the entire Universe.
True is the True Guru. Infinite is the Word of His Shabad.
Through His Shabad, the world is saved.
Out of millions, only a few understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਦੇਦਾ ਸਾਸ ਗਿਰਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aape karataa kar kar vekhai dedaa saas giraahaa he |4|
lines.english: The Creator Himself created the creation; He gazes upon it, and blesses it with breath and nourishment. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad rate rang laae |
lines.english: Imbued with the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they are colored in His Love.
Those humble beings who serve the True Guru are true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਾਲਾਹਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਬਖਸੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: har saalaaheh sadaa sukhadaataa har bakhase bhagat salaahaa he |5|
lines.english: They praise the Lord, the Giver of peace forever; the Lord forgives His devotees, and blesses them with His Praise. ||5||
The falsest of the false die, only to be reborn.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਅਥਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: agam agochar veparavaahaa bhagat vachhal athaahaa he |6|
lines.english: The inaccessible, unfathomable, self-sufficient, incomprehensible Lord is the Lover of His devotees. ||6||
The Perfect True Guru implants Truth within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਲਿਖਦਾ ਸਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gunadaataa varatai sabh antar sir sir likhadaa saahaa he |7|
lines.english: The Giver of virtue is pervading deep within the nucleus of all beings; He inscribes the time of destiny upon each and every person's head. ||7||
Through the True Word of the Shabad, they sing His Glorious Praises forever.
The Gurmukh knows that God is always ever-present.
That humble being who serves the Shabad, is comforted and fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚੈ ਓਮਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: anadin seveh sachee baanee sabad sachai omaahaa he |8|
lines.english: Night and day, he serves the True Word of the Guru's Bani; he delights in the True Word of the Shabad. ||8||
The ignorant and blind cling to all sorts of rituals.
They stubborn-mindedly perform these rituals, and are consigned to reincarnation.
